Headline: #71 71st/South Shore Temporary Reroute near Commercial/102nd
ShortDescription: #71 71st/South Shore buses are rrtd via Commercial, 95th, Escanaba, 94th, then resume their normal route on Commercial due to street blockage nr Commercial/92nd

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Commercial, 95th, Escanaba, 94th, then resume their normal route on Commercial.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Commercial/92nd.

Headline: #67 67th-69th-71st , #94 California Temporary Reroute at 69th/Bell
ShortDescription: 67 67th-69th-71st , 94 California buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near 69th/Bell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th-69th-71st ,#94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 69th, Damen, 67th and Western including normal route streets due to street blockage at 69th/Bell.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Red Line Service Delayed near Morse
ShortDescription: Red Line trains are standing near the area of Morse due to an unauthorized person on the tracks. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line trains are standing near the area of Morse due to an unauthorized person on the tracks.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
